title: LootSelect
description: A sleek UI to selectively loot nearby items.
body: When your inventory is full and the ground is littered with loot, constantly dropping items to pick up the ones you want is a hassle. **LootSelect** solves this by adding a sleek, scrollable list next to your inventory screen, showing all items within reach and allowing you to pick up just the ones you want directly from there. ----- ### Requirements & Recommendations **Fabric**: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) **Forge** (1.20.1/1.21.1): [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) + [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) **Recommended**: [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove), [Stxck](https://modrinth.com/mod/staaaaaaaaaaaack) ----- ### Key Features - **Pick & Swap**: Click any item in the list to "grab" it. You can place it directly into an empty slot or swap it with an existing item in your inventory. - **Auto-Pickup Toggle**: Easily switch vanilla auto-pickup on or off using the toggle button in the panel or shortcut (Default: `P`). While disabled, item can only be collectible via the LootSelect panel. - **Minimize/Maximize Toggle**: Easily switch the panel size using the button in the panel. - **Half Pickup**: `Right-click` an item in the list to take half of the stack instead of the full amount. - **Dispose**: `Middle-click` an item to discard it directly from the ground. - **Rapid Collection**: Use `Shift-Click` to instantly move items from the ground into your bags. This is useful for quickly equipping armor, shields, or totem. - **Sticky Item Hovering**: The scroll position intelligently adjusts when the item list updates, keeping your hovered item under the cursor whenever possible. - **Hotbar Swap**: Pressing `Ctrl + 1-9` while hovering over an item allows quick-swapping to your hotbar. - **Offhand Swap**: Press the `F` key while hovering over an item to instantly swap it with your offhand slot. - **Detailed Tooltips**: Hover over items in the list to view full tooltips, including enchantments, potion effects, and durability—no need to pick them up first. ### Mod Compatibility LootSelect features seamless integration with several popular mods to enhance your looting experience: - **[Staaaaaaaaaaaack (Stxck)](https://modrinth.com/mod/staaaaaaaaaaaack)**: Grouped item entities are correctly reflected in the list. When items are stacked on the ground, the list displays the total quantity (e.g., "2x", "12x") in yellow, matching the mod's overlay. - **[Inventorio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventorio)**: Smartly sorts tools and off-hand items into the correct Toolbelt or Utility Belt slots when using Shift-Click or F key. It prioritizes the currently selected utility slot and respects Inventorio's UI toggle states. - **[Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot) & [Charm of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm-of-undying)**: When using Shift-Click to pick up items, LootSelect intelligently prioritizes moving Elytras and Totems of Undying into the dedicated slots provided by these mods. - **[YyzsBackpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack)**: Full integration for dynamic inventory layouts. LootSelect's panel automatically adjusts its position when the backpack is equipped or opened. Additionally, items from this mod (and others) intelligently prioritize Trinkets or Curios slots when using Shift-Click. - **[Auto Pickup Filter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/auto-pickup-filter)**: Items you've configured to "Auto-Pickup: DISABLED" will only be collectible via the LootSelect list. You can quickly toggle the auto-pickup status for any item directly in the list by pressing the **"I"** key. ### Modpacks Feel free to include LootSelect in modpacks.
